title: Sandnes, Rogaland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Sandnes, Rogaland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Sandnes is a city in Rogaland with a population of 79,000. A growing city near Stavanger, known for its bicycle-friendly streets and as a gateway to the Lysefjord.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
